args.prompt: smithDesktop is actively compromised (C2 exfiltration + log clearing + malware execution). Automated host containment is not available. Choose your next action:

options.label: 🔴 Immediate: Escalate to T2 / SOC Manager for manual isolation
options.hint: Contact on-call engineer to physically isolate host from network or revoke AD creds

options.label: ⚠️ Quarantine: Create remediation ticket + block user creds
options.hint: Create incident ticket for helpdesk; document need to: kill wendy.smith sessions, reset creds, block 102.220.160.21 at firewall

options.label: 📋 Acknowledge & Document: Add findings to incident
options.hint: Record triage findings in incident for later response (lower urgency, not recommended for active exfil)

options.label: 🔍 Investigate Further: Check for lateral movement
options.hint: Search for other compromised hosts, pivot on wendy.smith's other sessions or related IPs before containing
